purpose: 1-page case summary ready to send when attorney replies with interest.

fields.potential_gatekeepers: [ PENDING — auditors, underwriters, financial institutions; role in transaction ]
fields.preferred_engagement_structure: Contingency preferred; open to hybrid arrangements for the right counsel

usage_instruction: When attorney replies with positive interest, populate all fields and send as clean 1-page summary. File completed brief to: corporate_x_factor/case_materials/case_brief_YYYYMMDD.pdf
terminology_reminder: Use 'Post-Judgment Recovery' externally. Never use 'Judgment Monetization' in attorney-facing materials.
